description: Style Note Dressing the elite for years, allen solly has crafted some of the classiest accessories that rise your level of sophistication with ease. This white and black tie from the British brand is no exception. Wear it over well-fitting dress shirts in muted shades with crisp formal attire. Product Details Has a diagonally striped design Loop with brand badge on the inner Material and Care Made of microfibre for luxurious feel and light sheen Dry clean only Size Length: 150 cm
